items.title: May 27, 2003: This play by Steve Nash in Game 5 of the Western Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 27, 2003: This play by Steve Nash in Game 5 of the Western Conference Finals.

Nash scored 14 PTS, Michael Finley had 31 PTS/8 REB/5 STL/2 BLK, and Nick Van Exel added 21 PTS in the Dallas Mavericks' 103-91 win at San Antonio. Tim Duncan had 23 PTS/15 REB/6 AST for the Spurs.

items.title: I was doing some film work on Allen Graves this week and three's a lot of Jaime Jaquez Jr. in his game. Graves is bigger, but they play similarly, especially at a similar point in their college careers. I think Graves is going to ultimately land somewhere middle portion of the fi
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt: I was doing some film work on Allen Graves this week and three's a lot of Jaime Jaquez Jr. in his game. Graves is bigger, but they play similarly, especially at a similar point in their college careers. I think Graves is going to ultimately land somewhere middle portion of the first round.

items.title: OKC is the only team that can win the title with bad injury luck.
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt:
OKC is the only team that can win the title with bad injury luck.

With bad health, they are vulnerable, of course. But the rest of the teams don't have a chance in that same situation.
